comments.text: Please stop using AI…..it spoils your videos……….👎

comments.author: @KerwynWilson-w3q
comments.text: I enjoy the videos you do. Maybe you should not rely so much on AI narration since the program continues to mispronounce names and words and inserts pauses at the wrong stage of the sentence making it difficult to understand parts of the narration. However, the other aspects of the videos in terms of production are well executed.
